Transcript   How to reset your password A step-by-step guide showing how Security Officer+ can reset a password for a General User in NAB Connect. 1. Click 'Admin' In the menu. 2. Click 'Users & permissions'. 3. Select the checkbox for the user. 4. Click the 'Reset Password' button. 5. Click 'Reset Password' to confirm. The General User will receive an email with their temporary password, and instructions for creating a new password.   Other useful NAB Connect help videos   Use our video guides to help you complete common banking tasks in NAB Connect.
